skills.name: Guard Up
skills.description: Allows you to guard against ordinarily unblockable attacks.

levels.description: Allows you to guard against ordinarily unblockable attacks.

skills.name: Thunder Resistance
skills.description: Increases thunder resistance. Also improves defense at higher levels.

levels.description: Thunder resistance +6
Thunder resistance +12
Thunder resistance +20 Defense +10

skills.name: Partbreaker
skills.description: Makes it easier to break or sever parts of large monsters.

levels.description: Part damage +10%
Part damage +20%
Part damage +30%

skills.name: Guard
skills.description: Reduces knockbacks and stamina depletion when guarding.

levels.description: Very slightly decreases the impact of attacks.
Slightly decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 15%.
Greatly decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 15%.
Greatly decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 30%.
Massively decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.

skills.description: Increases defense. Level up to improve resistances as well.

skills.name: Blast Resistance
skills.description: Grants protection against blastblight.

levels.description: Delays blastblight and reduces blast damage.

Prevents blastblight.

skills.name: Flinch Free
skills.description: Prevents knockbacks and other reactions to small damage.

levels.description: Prevents knockbacks. Increases some Kinsect extract effects.
